# Total execution gas of this compiler's bytecode vs solc's for solidity-gas.
# Generated by scripts/UpdateCorpusGas.lean; re-pin with scripts/update-gas.sh.
# Pinned to solc 0.8.35, EVM version osaka. 'ours' is a ceiling:
# CI fails if this compiler's total rises above it while solc's is unchanged.
# columns: fixture<TAB>ours<TAB>solc
BitMath.sol	4521	1836
FullMath.sol	5304	1635
LPFeeLibrary.sol	5355	1294
LiquidityMath.sol	2742	831
ProtocolFeeLibrary.sol	3839	1091
SafeCast.sol	4838	1545
SqrtPriceMath.sol	23123	6525
TickBitmap.sol	67507	49965
TickMath.sol	1008056	283870
UnsafeMath.sol	2434	768
